mapper.select: SELECT DEVICE_ID, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(COLLECT_TIME)/#{intervalSec})*#{intervalSec}) AS COLLECT_TIME, ROUND(AVG(RESPONSE_TIME), 2) AS RESPONSE_TIME, ROUND(MIN(RESPONSE_MIN_TIME), 2) AS RESPONSE_MIN_TIME, ROUND(MAX(RESPONSE_MAX_TIME), 2) AS RESPONSE_MAX_TIME, ROUND(AVG(PACKET_LOSS), 2) AS PACKET_LOSS FROM p_icmp_t WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND COLLECT_TIME >= #{startDate} AND COLLECT_TIME <= #{endDate} GROUP BY FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(COLLECT_TIME)/#{intervalSec}) ORDER BY COLLECT_TIME
